name: Jekyll
description: Jekyll — Ruby static site generator processing Markdown and Liquid templates, natively supported by GitHub Pages.

seo.title: Jekyll — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Jekyll: Jekyll — Ruby static site generator processing Markdown and Liquid templates, natively supported by GitHub Pages.

when_to_use: Static site generation with Markdown and Liquid templates
GitHub Pages-native blog or documentation site hosting
Developer blogs and project sites built with zero CMS cost
Fast static site builds for small personal and open-source sites
Converting Markdown content to HTML with Ruby and Jekyll

cons: Plugin API frozen compared to Hugo
review.verdict: Still the default for GitHub Pages blogs, but Hugo and Astro have lapped it on speed and DX.
review.best_for: Developers wanting free GitHub Pages hosting for blogs or documentation sites
review.not_for: Large content sites, non-Ruby teams, or anyone building modern interactive pages

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
